theme.description: A highly functional, data-dense VC deal flow dashboard using a split-view structure. It strictly adheres to the dark theme requirements (#0d0d14) with electric purple accents (#7c6dfa).

layout.structure: Full-screen Split View (No page scrolling, inner scrolling only)
layout.container: h-screen w-full flex flex-col bg-[#0d0d14] text-white overflow-hidden
layout.header: h-16 shrink-0 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-[#0d0d14]/80 backdrop-blur-md z-10
layout.left_panel: w-full md:w-[400px] shrink-0 border-r border-white/10 flex flex-col bg-[#11111a] overflow-hidden

header.sync_button: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm transition-colors flex items-center gap-2

contact_list.row: p-4 border-b border-white/5 cursor-pointer transition-colors hover:bg-[#161622] flex items-start gap-4
contact_list.avatar: h-10 w-10 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-[#7c6dfa]/20 text-[#7c6dfa] flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold

contact_details.wrapper: p-8 max-w-4xl mx-auto w-full flex flex-col gap-8
contact_details.hero_section: flex items-start gap-6 pb-8 border-b border-white/10
contact_details.hero_avatar: h-20 w-20 rounded-full bg-[#7c6dfa]/20 text-[#7c6dfa] flex items-center justify-center text-2xl font-bold border border-[#7c6dfa]/30
contact_details.info_grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-6 bg-[#11111a] rounded-xl border border-white/5
contact_details.deal_card: p-4 rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-[#11111a] hover:border-[#7c6dfa]/50 transition-colors flex justify-between items-center
contact_details.notes_textarea: min-h-[150px] bg-[#11111a] border-white/10 focus-visible:ring-[#7c6dfa] resize-y rounded-xl p-4 text-sm text-gray-300
contact_details.tag: px-3 py-1 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-full text-xs text-gray-300

states.empty: flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-center p-8

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components.
Ensure `lucide-react` is used for all iconography (e.g., Search, RefreshCw, User, Mail, MapPin, Briefcase).
The layout must strictly follow a 100vh split view. Do not let the entire page scroll; only the contact list and the detail panel should scroll independently.
Do not use generic gray backgrounds for dark mode. Strictly adhere to the #0d0d14 app background and #11111a surface colors specified in the guidelines.
In the contact list row, display avatar initials correctly parsed from the contact name.
All interactive elements must include the specified `data-testid` attributes.
For the linked deals, show the Deal Subject, Stage, and Score. Style the score with color based on its value (e.g., >80 green, <50 red).
Ensure the fonts use 'DM Sans'. If not available by default, ensure it is imported or noted.
Make the right panel render an 'Empty State' if no contact is selected from the list.
